examples: His sudden reappearance must have been a shock.
It was for neither a scream nor a crow that she was watching, it was for the reappearance of Peter.
No, at least I do not view the web services programming model as a reappearance or revitalization of CORBA.
"Returnees" are those who, for some reason, dropped off and are making a reappearance.
The social x-rays do not make a reappearance, but the gold-digging second wives do.
